author: Brandjuh
description: Owner-only smoke tests and status checks for the MissionChief scraper cogs.
install_msg:
Scraper Tester installed.

Use `[p]load scrapertester` to enable.

Commands:
- `[p]scrapers status` - Safe status check without live scraping
- `[p]scrapers smoke` - Small live smoke test for scraper health
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store end user data. It reads scraper status and may trigger small scraper health checks.
